messages.content: # Here is how to fix the “Access to the path is denied” error

## Method 1
> You will need to reinstall Assetto Corsa on the same drive where Content Manager is installed.
> For most cases this will be on your **C: Drive**

## Method 2
### Step 1
> Open the `Virus & Threat Protection` and click protection history

### Step 2
> If it says `No Recent Actions` then your game will likely be fixed by doing Method 1
> If it shows recent actions in the `assettocorsa` folder then follow the rest of it.
> if there is anything else here then you likely have a virus and should notify staff.

### Step 3
> Go back to the main page and click `Manage Settings` under the `Virus & Threat Protection Settings` section.

### Step 4
> Click on `Manage Controlled Folder Access` which is under the `Controlled Folder Access` section.
